# clang trunk: assertion "unsigned range includes negative?" in AnalyzeComparison during Sema of != with negation on unsigned __int128 vector

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173682
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T06:08:38Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/vejzPK1ov

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Console
```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/Sema/SemaChecking.cpp:12025: void AnalyzeComparison(clang::Sema&, clang::BinaryOperator*): Assertion `unsignedRange->NonNegative && "unsigned range includes negative?"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

## Code
```c
typedef unsigned __int128 V __attribute__((vector_size(64)));

int const_1 = 0;
V foo(V c) {
  c >>= const_1 != (- c);
  return c;
}
```

## Code
```c
typedef unsigned __int128 V __attribute__((vector_size(64)));

int const_1 = 0;
V foo(V c) {
  c &gt;&gt;= const_1 != (- c);
  return c;
}
```
